name: Next.js Kubernetes Deployment
description: Deploy Next.js on Kubernetes cluster with service and ingress

steps.name: Create namespace
steps.command: kubectl create namespace ${NAMESPACE} --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -

steps.name: Create secrets
steps.command: kubectl create secret generic ${APP_NAME}-secrets --from-literal=mongodb-uri=${MONGODB_URI} --from-literal=jwt-secret=${JWT_SECRET} -n ${NAMESPACE} --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -

steps.name: Create Kubernetes manifest
steps.command:
cat > ${DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/deployment.yaml << 'EOF'
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: ${APP_NAME}-config
  namespace: ${NAMESPACE}
data:
  NODE_ENV: "production"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: ${APP_NAME}
  namespace: ${NAMESPACE}
spec:
  replicas: ${REPLICAS}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: ${APP_NAME}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ${APP_NAME}
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: ${DOCKER_IMAGE}
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
          name: http
        env:
        - name: NODE_ENV
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: ${APP_NAME}-config
              key: NODE_ENV
        - name: MONGODB_URI
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: ${APP_NAME}-secrets
              key: mongodb-uri
        - name: JWT_SECRET
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: ${APP_NAME}-secrets
              key: jwt-secret
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /api/auth/check
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /api/auth/check
            port: 3000
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: ${APP_NAME}
  namespace: ${NAMESPACE}
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: ${APP_NAME}
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 3000
    protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: ${APP_NAME}
  namespace: ${NAMESPACE}
spec:
  rules:
  - host: ${DOMAIN}
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: ${APP_NAME}
            port:
              number: 80
EOF
